positive: Minimalist vector style illustration of a friendly, whimsical celestial fox guiding a small constellation across a crescent moon. The composition must feature clean, interlocking shapes and strong contrast between deep indigo and vibrant gold leaf accents. Style should mimic stylized Japanese woodblock prints (Ukiyo-e influence, but modern and clean). Include stylized swirling galaxies and geometric floral elements (like cherry blossoms and mandalas) framing the main scene. High detail, perfect symmetry, suitable for textile printing, solid white background for easy framing.
negative: photorealistic, noise, blur, gradient, signature, watermark, text, logo, low detail, poor anatomy, artifacts, ugly, cropped, blurry background
